name: testRetainCurrencyWhenReSelectingSameOption
description: Verify that re-selecting an already selected currency keeps the selection unchanged.
descriptionHtml: Verify that re-selecting an already selected currency keeps the selection unchanged.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that re-selecting an already selected currency keeps the selection unchanged.

steps.name: This test is temporarily disabled till bug fixed.
Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
